description: A mcp server provide infomation from pkg.go.dev. For all golang programmers

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-wvj2-96wp-fq3f in github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk@0.2.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk to a version that resolves GHSA-wvj2-96wp-fq3f. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-wvj2-96wp-fq3f for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
